---
title: "About"
---

::: {.content-section}

### About This Site

SisengAI is the personal website of Ricky Macharm — a space to share knowledge, projects, and insights at the intersection of data science, machine learning, financial engineering, and natural language processing.

The site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), hosted on GitHub Pages, and deployed via GitHub Actions on every push to `main`.

:::
